channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Series of Explosions Hit Maiduguri, Including Maiduguri Teaching Hospital During Ramadan
item.description: Na Monday evening, Maiduguri, the capital of Borno State, gatz serious wahala as multiple explosions burst for different parts of the city. The first blast happen around 7pm during iftar, the time wey...

item.title: Canada Considering Non-Offensive Military Support Amid Gulf Shipping Tensions
item.description: Canada’s Defence Minister, David McGuinty, has indicated that the Canadian government is open to providing military assistance in the Gulf region amid rising tensions with Iran, but clarified that Can...

item.title: Parliament investigates Showmax closure and its impact on local content and jobs
item.description: Parliament's Portfolio Committee on Communications and Digital Technologies is taking steps to examine the implications of Canal+'s decision to shut down the streaming service Showmax, previously oper...

item.title: India’s Gas Shortage Exposed Amid Iran Conflict and Foreign Policy Challenges
item.description: India is experiencing widespread cooking gas shortages due to the ongoing conflict involving Iran, a country critical to India’s energy imports. Despite having no role in the conflict, India is heavil...

item.title: Major Winter Storm Shuts Down Northeastern Ontario, Disrupting Travel and Services
item.description: A historic two-day winter storm has blanketed parts of northeastern Ontario with heavy snow and freezing rain, causing dangerous travel conditions. Environment Canada has warned that the storm will co...

item.title: Social media backlash after photos show Oscars venue left covered in rubbish by attendees
item.description: A photo revealing the Dolby Theatre strewn with litter following the 2026 Academy Awards has triggered widespread criticism of Hollywood celebrities’ behaviour. Shared by journalist Matt Neglia, the i...

item.title: The Role of BIM Electrical Modeling in Sustainable Architecture
item.description: Sustainability in architecture is increasingly vital, focusing on creating buildings that are both efficient and environmentally responsible. Building Information Modeling (BIM), particularly BIM elec...

item.title: U.S. Vice-President Vance expresses support for Trump's approach in Iran conflict
item.description: On 16th March 2026, U.S. Vice-President J.D. Vance publicly expressed his support for President Donald Trump's handling of the ongoing conflict with Iran. Speaking from the Oval Office, Mr. Vance stat...

item.title: Drone attack halts oil loading at Fujairah port in UAE
item.description: On Monday, oil loading operations at the United Arab Emirates' Fujairah port were suspended after a drone attack started a fire in the emirate’s petroleum industrial zone, two sources told Reuters. Fu...

item.title: Jeffrey Epstein Attempted to Influence Online Search Results, DOJ Files Reveal
item.description: Newly released files from the US Department of Justice show that Jeffrey Epstein, the convicted sex offender, made efforts to manipulate internet search results to improve his public image. Among the ...

item.title: ACM staff informed of chair Antony Catalano’s criminal charges through news reports
item.description: Australian Community Media (ACM) staff, including managing director Tony Kendall, were caught off guard when they learned that the company’s chair and major investor, Antony Catalano, faced criminal c...

item.title: How Outdoor Wellness Architecture is Transforming Health and Living Spaces
item.description: Outdoor wellness architecture is emerging as a significant shift in how people approach health and well-being, moving away from traditional indoor gyms toward nature-integrated spaces. Initially popul...

item.title: African Governments Cautious Over Citizens Recruited by Russian Forces
item.description: Several African countries are handling carefully the issue of their citizens being recruited into Russian military forces. Kenya’s foreign minister, Musalia Mudavadi, is visiting Russia amid rising pr...

item.title: Commuters and advocacy groups stage protest against rising oil prices and fare increases
item.description: Various commuter groups and advocacy organizations gathered in Metro Manila on March 17, 2026, to protest against the rising oil prices and the corresponding increase in public transportation fares. P...

item.title: Middle East Crude Benchmarks Surge to Records Amid US-Israel-Iran War Supply Disruptions
item.description: Spot premiums for Middle East crude grades like Oman and Dubai have soared to all-time highs due to the ongoing US and Israeli war on Iran, which has severely disrupted supply and trade. Cash Dubai’s ...

item.title: Chike Claims He Was Scammed of $20,000 by Social Media User
item.description: Popular Nigerian singer Chike Ezekpeazu don raise alarm say one social media user wey dem dey call Chioma Nneoma Ochibili don scam am of $20,000. Chike yan say he give the money to Chioma for one busi...

item.title: Iran presses India to release three seized tankers amid talks on safe passage through Strait of Hormuz
item.description: According to the report, Iran has asked India to release three tankers seized near Indian waters in February as part of wider talks on securing safe passage for Indian‑flagged or India‑bound vessels t...

item.title: Investigation into Suspect in Nyeri Women's Double Murder
item.description: Police in Nyeri County are investigating a man suspected of murdering two women in a shocking double homicide that has left the community reeling. The suspect, who was the last person seen with the vi...

item.title: Mmeli expresses support for Thandeka ahead of Big Brother Mzansi finale
item.description: Big Brother Mzansi evictee Mmeli Khumalo has expressed his unwavering support for Thandeka, his 'LOML' (love of my life), as she heads into the Season 6 finale. In an interview following his eviction,...

item.title: Trump criticises Gavin Newsom over dyslexia and presidential suitability
item.description: President Donald Trump has once again targeted California Governor Gavin Newsom over his dyslexia, suggesting that the learning disability should disqualify Newsom from the presidency. Speaking to rep...
